properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v2 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come you broken, heavy laden Come you helpless, come you in despair Come be blessed, come be saved Come, believe, come receive the goodness of God’s grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God’s grace is amazing, the lifeline of my soul God’s grace is faithful, Jesus conquered all By grace, He died, so I may live By grace, I am saved

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come you weary, hope and be free Come you helpless, lift your misery Come be blessed, come be saved Come believe, come receive the goodness of God’s grace
